name: Product Demo
description: Feature-focused walkthrough. Opens with the product, demonstrates key features and benefits, closes with value proposition. Best for products with clear visual differentiators.

scenes.description: Stunning product reveal or bold feature claim
scenes.footage_hint: Hero product shot, dramatic reveal, or close-up detail

scenes.description: Primary feature demonstration with clear visual proof
scenes.footage_hint: Product in action showing key feature, close-up details
Different angle or use case showing second key benefit

scenes.description: Product in its natural context -- show the aspirational outcome
scenes.footage_hint: Lifestyle scene with product, beautiful environment

scenes.description: Value proposition or social proof reinforcement
scenes.footage_hint: Price point, review count, satisfaction guarantee

scenes.description: Clear CTA with product beauty shot
scenes.footage_hint: Final product hero shot with CTA overlay
